title: En Kannukulla Oru Sirikki Lyrics Appuchi Graamam
stanzas:
En Kannukulla Oru Sirikki Song Lyrics AppuchiGraamam
#VishalC #Charukesh #VarunVishwa

en kannu kulla oru sirikki
kattipottalae enna irukki
manasa kattipoda maruthaale
haiyoh aiyayo (2)

En kadhula isai pola
pesura un koraallalae
yesapolave neeyum pesave
eppovume rasikira naane
yedho yedho paadurae naane

en kannu kulla oru sirikki
kattipottalae enna irukki
manasa kattipoda maruthaale
haiyoh aiyayo

kuthaalathu sarala pol nallaa
sirikka ye thenmozhi
kannangkuzhi pothaathunu
mayakkum un mai vizhi

karuva paya kanavellam
Color padam  aanathanaala
muzhichaalum medhanthalae
Kathalenum  palaaku mela

thadumaraum en manasu kekuthu
eppo unna servathu maane
pithanathan aaguren naane

en kannu kulla oru sirikki
kattipottalae enna irukki
manasa kattipoda maruthaale
haiyoh aiyayo

vetkathuke vekam varum
un maeni muzhu pournami
sokknukke aasa varum
enna azhagu ye kanmani

thai maasam thaethi kurikava
Thenam thenam  kelvi kekuthu
un nenjula uonjal aadave
manjakayur yenki vaaduthu

thadumaraum en manasu kekuthu
eppo unna servathu maane
pithanathan aaguren naane

en kannu kulla oru sirikki
kattipottalae enna irukki
manasa kattipoda maruthaale
haiyo haiyayo

thadumaraum en manasu kekuthu
eppo unna servathu maane
pithanathan aaguren naane

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses the joy and beauty of love, highlighting the emotions that come with it.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Appuchi Graamam, this song plays during a romantic moment, showcasing the lead characters' feelings for each other.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by Varun Vishwa, known for his melodious voice and emotive singing style.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for En Kannukulla Oru Sirikki is composed by Vishal C, who is recognized for his unique sound in Tamil cinema.

When was this song released?

The song was released on November 24, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In En Kannukulla Oru Sirikki, the protagonist expresses his deep affection through poetic lyrics that resonate with the listener's heart. The song beautifully captures the essence of romance, portraying the joy and excitement of love. With its soothing melody and heartfelt delivery by Varun Vishwa, it evokes feelings of happiness and nostalgia. This enchanting track is a perfect fit for romantic occasions, making it a memorable addition to the soundtrack of Appuchi Graamam.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: En Kannukulla Oru Sirikki from Appuchi Graamam is a delightful melody that captures the essence of romance with its enchanting lyrics and soothing vocals by Varun Vishwa. The collaboration between Charukesh's heartfelt lyrics and Vishal C's captivating music creates a magical experience that resonates with listeners. Dive into this beautiful song that perfectly encapsulates the joy of love and connection.
stanzaMeanings: There is a smile in my eyes, what is it that my heart is holding back, oh my!
In my story, you speak like music, your words are like a song, you always make me happy, I am singing something.
There is a smile in my eyes, what is it that my heart is holding back, oh my!
Like a simple smile, your beautiful eyes can enchant, they can mesmerize me.
All my dreams are colorful because of you, even if I try to hide them, they still shine bright.
My heart is restless, when will I become crazy for you?
There is a smile in my eyes, what is it that my heart is holding back, oh my!
Your beauty brings a longing for the full moon, my lovely one.
In the month of Thai, questions arise, your heart dances with joy, my heart is filled with happiness.
My heart is restless, when will I become crazy for you?
There is a smile in my eyes, what is it that my heart is holding back, oh my!
When someone comes, they come without notice, even if it’s just for a day, they leave a mark.
My heart is restless, when will I become crazy for you?
